tasks.title: Add getEditorOpenRateCard() data-source and remove stale PHASE 2 comment
tasks.description: In apps/admin/src/lib/dashboard-sources/editor.ts (~line 29), implement a data-source that resolves the most-recently-sent campaign (sentAt not null, latest) and returns its open rate via the existing use-campaign-metrics hook (apps/admin/src/hooks/newsletter/use-campaign-metrics.ts). Reuse the hook rather than duplicating fetch logic (AC-4). Remove the stale '🔴 PHASE 2 (no email-open tracking today)' comment and any text implying open-rate tracking is unavailable (AC-3). Do NOT modify backend (NewsletterTrackingService, webhook handler, computeMetrics). Tests: unit test the data-source resolves last-sent campaign id and maps openRate; cover the no-sends path returning a neutral value. Test file: apps/admin/src/lib/dashboard-sources/test/editor-open-rate.test.ts (or colocated test dir matching repo convention).

subtasks.title: Resolve last-sent campaign (sentAt not null, latest)
Remove stale PHASE 2 comment in editor.ts (AC-3)
Unit test data-source happy path + no-sends path

tasks.title: Render EDITOR Card C open-rate widget
tasks.description: Wire the getEditorOpenRateCard() result into the EDITOR dashboard Card C component so it displays the open rate of the most recently sent campaign, formatted as 'N%' with zero decimal places (AC-1). Follow the existing dashboard card rendering pattern in apps/admin (match sibling cards in editor dashboard). Tests: component/render assertion that a sent campaign with known metrics shows the expected 'N%' string. Reuses the data-source from T-001.

subtasks.title: Bind data-source output to Card C widget

tasks.title: Implement Card C empty-state for no-sends
tasks.description: When no campaign has ever been sent (sentAt null for all), Card C must render a neutral empty-state (e.g. '—') instead of a percentage and must not throw (AC-2). Handle the empty/undefined metrics path gracefully in both the data-source consumer and the widget. Tests: render assertion that with zero sent campaigns the card shows the neutral placeholder and no error is thrown.

subtasks.title: Render neutral '—' when no sent campaign (AC-2)
Guard against throw on empty metrics

tasks.title: [DECISION] Optionally expose computed openRatePct/clickRatePct in metrics API
tasks.description: Nice-to-have (spec §3.2, §7 T-03). DECISION REQUIRED before implementing: keep percentage math client-side in use-campaign-metrics (current behavior, default) OR add computed openRatePct/clickRatePct fields to CampaignMetricsSchema in @repo/schemas and the GET /admin/newsletter/campaigns/{id}/metrics response, then remove the client-side math from the hook. If approved: update schema, endpoint mapping in apps/api/src/routes/newsletter/admin/campaigns.ts, the hook, and the hook's tests. If rejected: close as won't-do. Out of scope unless explicitly decided. Does NOT block the must-have card (T-001..T-003).

subtasks.title: Decide: client-side math (keep) vs API-computed pct
If API: add openRatePct/clickRatePct to CampaignMetricsSchema
If API: update endpoint response + hook + hook tests

tasks.title: Tests and coverage gate for Card C
tasks.description: Cross-cutting tests verifying AC-1 (open rate visible, 'N%') and AC-2 (empty-state) end to end at the dashboard/data-source level, ensuring overall coverage does not drop below 90% (AC-5). If T-004 shipped the API change, update use-campaign-metrics tests accordingly. Run scoped (admin newsletter dashboard) — never the full suite at once.
